errors: No phase-6 artifact validation run; artifact-validation.json is from phase 5.

criteria.name: Byte-identical outputs on re-run
criteria.evidence: test_deterministic_outputs passes — resampling.py:112 sorts by (station, timestamp_utc).

criteria.name: Outputs sorted by (station, timestamp_utc)
criteria.evidence: resampling.py:112 uses sort_values([STATION_COLUMN, TIMESTAMP_COLUMN]). test_sorted_outputs passes.

criteria.name: Deterministic column order (alphabetical)
criteria.evidence: test_column_order_is_deterministic FAILS. CSV columns not in alphabetical order. cleaning.py does not apply sorted() to columns before writing. At src/pea_met_network/cleaning.py output section.

criteria.name: Pipeline manifest includes SHA256 checksums
criteria.evidence: test_manifest_has_checksums FAILS. pipeline_manifest.json has no 'checksums' key. cleaning.py writes manifest but never computes SHA256 hashes for output files.

criteria.name: --force flag with skip-if-newer logic
criteria.evidence: test_force_flag_overwrites passes. Tests confirm --force is accepted and processed.

criteria.name: Race condition fix (serial marker)
criteria.evidence: test_race_condition_fixed FAILS. test_data_refresh.py does not contain @pytest.mark.serial marker.

criteria.name: Checksum comparison between runs
criteria.evidence: test_checksum_comparison passes — SHA256 checksums of hourly CSV match between two runs.

failing_nodes.message: Race condition test not marked serial (AC-DET-6)

summary: Phase 6 REJECT: 3 of 7 acceptance criteria fail. Column order is not deterministic (AC-DET-3), pipeline manifest lacks SHA256 checksums (AC-DET-4), and the race condition test is not marked serial (AC-DET-6). Pre-flight also fails for two required functions (compute_checksum, verify_determinism) that are not implemented. Ralph needs to: (1) sort columns alphabetically before CSV write in cleaning.py, (2) add SHA256 checksum computation to the manifest writer, (3) add @pytest.mark.serial to test_data_refresh.py, and (4) implement compute_checksum and verify_determinism functions as required by pre_flight.py.
